{{Infobox character
| name = Vorus
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Vorus]] is an expert in [[Imperial]] history.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Vorus]] gave [[Calder]] a stern glare.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Vorus]] is [[Jyrine]]'s chaperone.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Vorus]] is a person known to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Of course, that’s more Vorus’ area of expertise than mine, isn’t it?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
